zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde Fleming於大約1352年出生在愛爾蘭時，她的父親Simon le Fleming26歲，母親Cicely Champernon24歲。她於大約1368年與Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen在愛爾蘭武爾斯特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼艾利蘭。

zh-hans.Killeen Chantry, Chruch Chapel, County M: 英国苏格兰奧可尼艾利蘭

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde Fleming于大约1352年出生在爱尔兰时，她的父亲Simon le Fleming26岁，母亲Cicely Champernon24岁。她于大约1368年与Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen在爱尔兰武爾斯特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国苏格兰奧可尼艾利蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde Fleming was born about 1352, in Ireland, her father, Simon le Fleming, was 26 and her mother, Cicely Champernon, was 24. She married Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen about 1368, in Ulster, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She was buried in Ireland, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde Fleming est née environ 1352, à Irlande, son père, Simon le Fleming, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Cicely Champernon, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen environ 1368, à Ulster, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elleenterrée à Ireland, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde Fleming um 1352 in Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon le Fleming 26 und ihre Mutter Cicely Champernon 24. Sie hat um 1368 in Ulster, Irland Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie wurde in Ireland, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde Fleming è nata il circa 1352 nel Irlanda, sua padre, Simon le Fleming, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Cicely Champernon, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen circa 1368, nel Ulster, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Fu sepolta a Ireland, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde Flemingが約1352年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父Simon le Flemingは26歳，母Cicely Champernonは24歳であった。約1368年にアイルランドウルスターでSir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリススコットランドオルクニーアイレランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde Fleming(이)가 대략 1352년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon le Fleming(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cicely Champernon(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1368년 아일랜드 울스터에서 Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 이렐랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Killeen Chantry, Chruch Chapel, County M: Ireland, Orkneyjar, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde Fleming nasceu aproximadamente 1352, em Irlanda, seu pai, Simon le Fleming, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Cicely Champernon, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen aproximadamente 1368, em Ulster, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela foi sepultada em Ireland, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde Fleming родилась около 1352 г. в местности Ирландия, её отцу по имени Simon le Fleming было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Cicely Champernon, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen около 1368 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она была похоронена в местности иреланд, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde Fleming nació aproximadamente 1352, en Irlanda, su papá, Simon le Fleming, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Cicely Champernon, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen aproximadamente 1368, en Ulster, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Fue sepultada en Ireland, Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido.
